members.document:
Optional type:
`FAIRPLAY` `WIDEVINE` `PLAYREADY` `AES128`
HLS-TS supports `FAIRPLAY` and `AES128`.
HLS-FMP4 supports `FAIRPLAY`, `WIDEVINE`, `PLAYREADY`, `AES128`, and permutation and combination of two or three from `FAIRPLAY`, `WIDEVINE`, `PLAYREADY` (use commas to concatenate, such as "FAIRPLAY,WIDEVINE,PLAYREADY").
DASH supports `WIDEVINE`, `PLAYREADY`, and the permutation and combination of `PLAYREADY` and `WIDEVINE` (use commas to concatenate, such as "PLAYREADY,WIDEVINE").

members.document: Video codec. Valid values: H264/H265. If this parameter is left empty, the original value will be used.
members.name: Vcodec

members.document: Video bitrate. Value range: [50000,40000000]. The value can only be a multiple of 1,000. If this parameter is left empty, the original value will be used.
members.name: VideoBitrate

members.document: Video width. The input range is (0, 4096] and must be a multiple of 2. If left blank, it represents passthrough.
members.name: Width

members.document: Video height. Input range is (0, 4096] and must be a multiple of 2. Leave empty to represent passthrough.
members.name: Height

members.document: Video frame rate. Valid when you select SPECIFIED_HZ for FrameRateType. Input range is [1, 240]. Leave blank to represent passthrough.
members.name: Fps

members.document: Whether to enable top speed codec. Valid value: CLOSE/OPEN. Default value: CLOSE.
members.name: TopSpeed

members.document: Top speed codec compression ratio. Value range: [0,50]. The lower the compression ratio, the higher the image quality.
members.name: BitrateCompressionRatio

members.document: Bitrate control mode. Optional values: [CBR|ABR|VBR]. Default: ABR.
members.name: RateControlMode

members.document: Watermark Id.
members.name: WatermarkId

members.document: Whether to enable the face blur function, 1 is on, 0 is off, and the default is 0.
members.name: FaceBlurringEnabled

members.document: This field indicates how to specify the output video frame rate. If selected FOLLOW_SOURCE, the output video frame rate is set to equal the frame rate of the first input video. If selected SPECIFIED_FRACTION, the output video frame rate is determined by the fraction (frame rate molecular and frame rate denominator). If selected SPECIFIED_HZ, the frame rate of the output video is determined by the HZ you input.
members.name: FrameRateType

members.document: Valid when you select SPECIFIED_FRACTION as the FrameRateType. Set the output frame rate molecular.
members.name: FrameRateNumerator

members.document: Valid when you select SPECIFIED_FRACTION for FrameRateType. Output frame rate denominator set.
members.name: FrameRateDenominator

members.document: Number of B-frames 1-3.
members.name: BFramesNum

members.document: Refer to the number of frames 1-16.
members.name: RefFramesNum

members.document: Additional video bitrate configuration.
members.name: AdditionalRateSettings

members.document: Video encoding configuration.
members.name: VideoCodecDetails

members.document: Video enhancement switch, 1: enable 0: disable.
members.name: VideoEnhanceEnabled

members.document: Video enhancement parameters array.
members.name: VideoEnhanceSettings

members.document: Colorspace configuration.
members.name: ColorSpaceSettings

members.document: Traceable watermark.
members.name: ForensicWatermarkIds

members.document: Text color, 6 hexadecimal characters in RGB (not required #).
members.name: TextColor

members.document: Background color, 6 hexadecimal characters in RGB (not required #)
members.name: BackgroundColor

members.document: Background opacity parameter. A number from 0 to 100. The default value is 0 (fully transparent).
members.name: BackgroundAlpha

members.document: Font size, in vh (1% of height), default value 0 means auto.
members.name: FontSize

members.document: The position of the text box, default value AUTO, can be empty; it represents the percentage of video height and supports integers from 0 to 100.
members.name: Line

members.document: The alignment mode of the text box on the Line. Available values: START, CENTER, END. Default: START. Can be blank.
members.name: LineAlignment

members.document: The position of the text box in another direction is a percentage of the video width or height, defaults to AUTO, and can be empty.
members.name: Position

members.document: The alignment mode of the text box on Position. Available values: LINE_LEFT, LINE_RIGHT, CENTER, AUTO. Default value: AUTO. Can be empty.
members.name: PositionAlignment

members.document: The size of the text box, a percentage of video width/height, value (0, 100], default AUTO, can be empty.
members.name: CueSize

members.document: Text alignment mode, available values START, CENTER, END, LEFT, RIGHT; default value CENTER, can be empty.
members.name: TextAlignment
